name: report_property
full_help:
report_property

Description: 
Report properties of object

Syntax: 
report_property  [-all] [-class <arg>] [-return_string] [-file <arg>] [-append]
                 [-regexp] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<object>] [<pattern>]

Returns: 
property report

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-all]            Report all properties of object even if not set
  [-class]          Object type to query for properties. Not valid with 
                    <object>
  [-return_string]  Set the result of running report_property in the Tcl 
                    interpreter's result variable
  [-file]           Filename to output result to.  Send output to console if 
                    -file is not used
  [-append]         Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-regexp]         Pattern is treated as a regular expression
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<object>]        Object to query for properties
  [<pattern>]       Pattern to match properties against
                    Default: *

Categories: 
Object, PropertyAndParameter, Report
